title: coreopsis canescentifolia
intro: Coreopsis canescentifolia, also known as the Canadian tickseed, is a flowering plant native to Canada and the United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Coreopsis canescentifolia include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis canescentifolia include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
